description_long: This object is a large, rectangular-bladed cleaver with a broad, flat metal blade and a wooden handle. The blade is wide and straight-edged, with a slightly curved top and a flat cutting edge, typical of butcher or kitchen cleavers. The handle is brown, likely made of wood, and features three visible metallic rivets securing it to the tang of the blade. The blade has a smooth, metallic finish, while the handle is contoured for grip and ergonomics. There are no visible decorative elements or engravings on either the blade or the handle. The overall design is utilitarian, prioritizing function and durability for heavy-duty chopping tasks.
description: A large, rectangular-bladed metal cleaver with a brown wooden handle and three rivets, designed for heavy-duty chopping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the broad, rectangular blade and the contoured wooden handle with three rivets.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the thin profile of the blade and handle, emphasizing the cleaver's flatness.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the back of the blade and handle, with rivets visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the thinness of the blade and handle, with the handle's brown color visible.
attribute_handle_design: contoured wooden handle with three metallic rivets
